serviceDescription: AWS Elemental MediaLive is a broadcast-grade live video processing service. It lets you create high-quality video streams for delivery to broadcast televisions and internet-connected multiscreen devices, like connected TVs, tablets, smart phones, and set-top boxes.

serviceSelector.title: AWS Elemental MediaLive
serviceSelector.description: MediaLive channels are priced based on the specifications of a channel's inputs and outputs. You are able to price 2 input and 6 output types per pricing configuration. If you need additional inputs or outputs, please create multiple MediaLive estimates.
serviceSelector.infoTitle: Select inputs, ouputs, and add-ons options
serviceSelector.infoDescription: At least one input and one output is required.
